title: erythroxylum urbanii
intro: Erythroxylum urbanii, also known as the Urban's coca plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Erythroxylaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Erythroxylum urbanii include its potential to improve cognitive function, reduce stress and anxiety, and even help with weight loss due to its appetite-suppressing properties. The herbal preparations of this plant can be consumed as a tea, made into a tincture, or used as a powder for medicinal purposes, although its availability and regulation may vary due to its relation to the more well-known coca leaf.
